subcodes.first_line: Your noble letter, from which wafteth the fragrance of thy love for the Beloved of God, the Mighty, the Inaccessible, hath reached this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بلغ الی الخادم کتابک الشریف الذی تضوع منه عرف حبک محبوب الله العزیز المنیع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
